scripts.dev:full: echo '⚠️  Use terminais separados: Terminal 1: npm run dev:contracts | Terminal 2: npm run deploy:local | Terminal 3: npm run dev'
scripts.deploy:local: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network localhost
scripts.deploy:polygon: cd contracts && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.ts --network polygon
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd contracts && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
